---
title: "Home"
---

This website hosts course materials for **Lecture for graduate students 2026**.

The site is currently being prepared. Lecture notes, announcements, and additional pages will be added here as the course develops.

# Information

- Course title: Lecture for graduate students 2026
- Academic year: 2026
- Status: Under construction

# Notes

- Check this page regularly for updates.
- New sections will appear in the sidebar once materials are published.

# License

Except where otherwise noted, the materials on this site are licensed under [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
